diagrams.title: Training Model Initialization & Weight Loading

diagrams.name: sampling_inference_pipeline
diagrams.title: Sampling / Inference Pipeline
diagrams.description: End-to-end inference flow: loading model, running single or batch sampling, and outputting generated worlds
diagrams.scope: Inference and sample generation entry points

diagrams.name: base_pipeline_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Base World Generation Pipeline Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Shared pipeline setup: loading tokenizer, network, model, text encoder, and guardrail models; then offloading for memory management
diagrams.scope: Abstract base pipeline initialization and teardown

diagrams.name: model_offloading_flow
diagrams.title: Model Offloading & Memory Management
diagrams.description: GPU memory offloading strategy: offloading network, tokenizer, guardrail, and text encoder models to free VRAM between pipeline stages

diagrams.name: text_to_world_generation
diagrams.title: Text-to-World Diffusion Generation
diagrams.description: Text-conditioned world generation: prompt upsampling, tokenizer decoding, model inference, and output generation

diagrams.title: Video-to-World Diffusion Generation
diagrams.description: Video-conditioned world generation: tokenizer encoding, prompt upsampling, model inference with optional offloading

diagrams.name: text_to_world_multiview_generation
diagrams.title: Text-to-World Multiview Generation

diagrams.name: video_to_world_multiview_generation
diagrams.title: Video-to-World Multiview Generation
diagrams.description: Multi-camera video-conditioned world generation: tokenizer encoding, model inference with offloading support for multiple views

diagrams.name: world_interpolation_pipeline
diagrams.title: World Interpolation Generation Pipeline

diagrams.name: gen3c_pipeline_flow
diagrams.title: Gen3C Generation Pipeline
diagrams.description: Gen3C 3D-consistent world generation: model loading, inference, and offload-aware generation

diagrams.name: guardrail_processing_flow

diagrams.description: Safety guardrail checks on prompts and video outputs: running text and video guardrails with optional offloading

diagrams.name: prompt_upsampling_flow
diagrams.title: Prompt Upsampling Flow
diagrams.description: Enhancing short prompts into detailed descriptions via the prompt upsampler model with optional memory offloading

diagrams.name: tokenizer_encoding_decoding
diagrams.title: Tokenizer Encoding & Decoding Flow
diagrams.description: Video tokenizer operations: encoding video frames into latent tokens for model input and decoding latents back to video

diagrams.name: model_run_with_offload
diagrams.title: Model Inference with Offload Strategy
diagrams.description: Adaptive inference strategy: running the diffusion model with memory offloading when GPU VRAM is limited
